name: Tamarind-Honey Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak tamarind pulp in boiling water for 15 minutes. Stir and mash with a fork to help it dissolve. Strain through a fine strainer into a bowl, pressing on the solids with the back of a wooden spoon to extract all the liquid.
2. In a bowl, combine the tamarind juice, lime juice, soy sauce, ketchup, honey, ginger, garlic, chili peppers, and lemongrass. Stir well to dissolve the honey. Season with salt and white pepper.
